stories.title: API endpoint authentication — bearer token middleware for /api/*
stories.description: All /api/* routes are currently unauthenticated. Add a configurable auth plug (bearer token or session-based) that fails-open when no token is configured (dev mode) but enforces in production.

stories.title: AgentLock auth gate status in Skills inspector
stories.description: Surface auth_gated boolean and auth_missing_tools list in SkillsLive inspector drawer. Add Fix button that calls create_authorization_hooks action.

stories.title: Skills UX: merge pagination/dry-run/shift-select branch
stories.description: Merge feat/skills-ux-dry-run-pagination into main. Page size 25, dry-run modal with diff preview, shift-click range selection, sticky filter row.

stories.title: Showcase pull-tab CCEM/APM/Both/Last Version — filtering + state persistence
stories.description: The pull-tab bar added to showcase/client/index.html needs state persistence via localStorage and correct feature filtering by version/category.

stories.title: GET /api/notifications/:id endpoint + Plane tracking
stories.description: Add GET /api/notifications/:id to surface a single notification with full refs/trace/metadata/actions payload. Update OpenAPI spec.

stories.title: CCEMHelper: Skills health summary in MenuBarView
stories.description: Add a skills section in CCEMHelper MenuBarView showing top unhealthy skills count and a link to /skills.

stories.title: OpenAPI spec update — auth security scheme + new endpoints
stories.description: Add bearer security scheme to OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec. Document GET /api/notifications/:id and any new auth endpoints.

stories.title: v7.2.0 release — CHANGELOG, version bump, CCEMHelper rebuild
stories.description: Bump mix.exs to 7.2.0, update CHANGELOG, rebuild CCEMHelper, git tag v7.2.0.
